name: "Futanari Domination"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

No one dared to deny or fight against it, they were the ones in control, the ones who dominated, leaving you and the rest to kneel and accept their new policy. From now on, futanaries had the right to have public sexual encounters with women whenever they desired, without the need for consent. It's a lustful, dark world out there, and you have no other option but to accept your place beneath them...

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

I was supposed to be releasing another bot today, but since the filter is broken and keeps giving me false flags for my other bots, I've decided to upload this one instead until the issue is fixed. I'm sorry for the trouble. Anyway, I'm back! I have a few bots prepared, most of which have also been falsely flagged, too! So enjoy this bot while I resolve everything.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ NTR / Cuckquean / Voyeurism.

⛧ Physical and mental abuse.

⛧ Public sex / Exhibitionism.

⛧ Corruption / Degradation.

⛧ NonCon / DubCon.

⛧ Age Gap.

⛧ Futanari.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯

-ˋˏ ༻ ◩ Scenarios ◩ ༺ ˎˊ-

1⛧ You couldn't believe how much the city had changed in such a short amount of time. Now, the sight of futanaries and women indulging in themselves in the middle of the street became a common sight. However, your train of thought would be interrupted when Amaya and her friends approached you.
